_comment: NPC town templates. Each town occupies one hex; the hex's biome is preserved. Templates specify building roster and NPC count. WorldGenerator places towns at world-gen time: 1 per ~25 hexes, even percentage of each faction, no two adjacent, ≥2 hexes from Riftspire. Phase 3 ships the template schema + WorldGenerator integration; actual NPC spawning for town residents lands in a later phase.

small_outpost.description: A handful of hardened locals around a single trader post. Good for low-level players.

medium_settlement.description: Walled compound with the full set of crafting stations. The default town size.

large_hub.description: Sprawling fortified city. One per faction per world.
